display.title: Ordering Food
display.description: Practice your survival skills at a local restaurant.

seed.user_goal_neutral: Order food, ask about preparation, get the bill
seed.scene_dynamics: Customer entering a busy restaurant, scanning menu, ordering and asking questions.

display.title: Asking Directions
display.description: Navigate through the city by asking for help.

seed.user_goal_neutral: Find a specific landmark and confirm the route
seed.scene_dynamics: Tourist stops a local on a busy street to ask for directions.

display.title: Shopping
display.description: Browse items, ask for prices, and find what you need.

seed.ai_role_neutral: shop assistant in a clothing store
seed.user_goal_neutral: Try something on, ask about sizes/prices, decide whether to buy
seed.scene_dynamics: Customer browsing a small boutique, interacting with an attentive staff member.

display.title: Job Interview
display.description: Prepare for your career with professional dialogue.

seed.user_goal_neutral: Answer interview questions, ask about the role, leave a good impression
seed.scene_dynamics: Formal interview in an office. Manager asks standard interview questions.

display.title: Casual Chat
display.description: Have a relaxed conversation about your day and interests.

seed.ai_role_neutral: a friendly acquaintance meeting for coffee
seed.user_goal_neutral: Catch up, share news, discuss interests
seed.scene_dynamics: Two people at a cafe table, relaxed catching-up chat.
